calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-14-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS, LLC's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant General Motors LLC's demurrer to plaintiff Alfredo Gaspar Gonzalez's fifth cause of action for fraudulent inducement - concealment is overruled (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, with a cover letter reflecting compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant General Motor's LLC motion to strike the prayer for punitive damages from plaintiff Alfredo Gaspar Gonzalez's First Amended Complaint (FAC) is denied. By companion order, the court overrules the demurrer to Gaspar Gonzalez's fraudulent concealment claim. This claim can support punitive damages. (Civ. Code 3294.) The fraudulent concealment alleged in the FAC-that the transmission defect that was knowingly concealed presented a safety hazard (FAC paras. 28, 68) because the defect "can suddenly and unexpectedly cause the driver to be unable to control the speed and acceleration/deceleration of the vehicle," and GM knew of the defect but concealed it (FAC para. 68)-is sufficient to support a punitive damages award if proven.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, with a cover letter reflecting compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Continued To Oct-15-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
